characters.appearance: Late 20s, slim build, fair complexion. Dark brown hair pulled back. Wears round wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Light pink button-down shirt, large black over-ear headphones.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Confident English बोलने की power को कभी underestimate मत करो। [Never underestimate the power of speaking confident English.]
Character A says: Supernova नाम का एक बेहतरीन AI app है। [There's a great AI app called Supernova.]
Character A says: इसका AI tutor आपको बोलते समय real-time feedback देता है। [Its AI tutor gives you real-time feedback while you speak.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by emphasizing the importance of confident English.
- Introduces Supernova as an AI-powered solution.
- Highlights the core feature of real-time feedback.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Confident English बोलने की power को कभी underestimate मत करो। Supernova AI app. Real-time feedback.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Carrier. [Carrier.]
Character A says: ये मुझे बता रहा है कि 'R' sound में थोड़ी गलती है। [It's telling me that there's a slight mistake in the 'R' sound.]
Character A says: Career. [Career.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app in action with a common Indian-English pronunciation mistake.
- Shows the AI tutor correcting the user gently.
- Provides a satisfying payoff when the user gets it right.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Carrier. ये मुझे बता रहा है कि 'R' sound में थोड़ी गलती है। Career.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: ये आपकी हिंदी भाषा के हिसाब से आपके daily lessons को personalize करता है, ताकि आप अपनी झिझक दूर कर सकें। [It personalizes your daily lessons based on your Hindi language, so you can overcome your hesitation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the personalized nature of the app.
- Connects the feature to the user's Hindi background, making it highly relevant.
- Focuses on the emotional benefit of overcoming hesitation.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Personalizes your daily lessons based on your Hindi language.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: आप real-world situations के लिए practice करेंगे, ताकि office या interview में हर word को confidence से बोल सकें। [You will practice for real-world situations, so you can speak every word with confidence in an office or interview.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shifts focus from elite coaches to practical, real-world application.
- Mentions high-stakes environments like offices and interviews.
- Reinforces the ultimate goal of speaking with confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Practice for real-world situations. Speak every word with confidence.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final call to action.
- Displays the brand logo and download prompt.
- Leaves the viewer with a clear, empowering message.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
Download Now
English बोलना सीखें Confidence के साथ
